title: Freight-Yard Block Assignment: Maximum Restricted-Latin Completion
strategies: build-nothing baseline: echo only the pre-built givens (reproduces the checker baseline B, ~0.1)
row-major smallest-block greedy: fast but dead-ends against forbidden lists, leaving cells empty
MRV backtracking search for the largest restricted-Latin completion, keeping the best partial board -- builds strictly more cuts than greedy
invalid: build block 0 everywhere -> Latin rule violated + givens clobbered -> rejected
